title: pyrethrum broussonetii
intro: Pyrethrum broussonetii, also known as Pyrethrum cinerariifolium, is a flowering plant belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. It is a natural source of pyrethrins, a class of compounds used as insecticides. The medicinal properties of Pyrethrum broussonetii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving pain. Herbal preparations of Pyrethrum broussonetii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
